notes: v0.14.0 — 4 picked mockups ported to Godot. CLASS (Categories Tab) — 4 class tabs (SHARD/BASTION/LANCE/CHORUS) + cinematic detail with stats bars + signature chip + SELECT/SKILL TREE actions. PROFILE popup (Dropdown) — click top bar opens cinematic card with avatar/nick/class chip/XP bar/wallet/nav links. ONBOARDING (Nickname + Class wizard) — mandatory first-time wizard, callsign input + 2×2 starter class grid (LANCE/CHORUS locked at LV 10), confirm gate. TUTORIAL (Categories Wiki) — new LEARN section, 10 topic tabs + cinematic detail with body/keys/tip/facts/checkpoints, REPLAY + MARK COMPLETE actions. Windows only.
